instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is chen_lee_6825. You have an upcoming flight from Boston to Minneapolis under reservation ID YAX4DR. You want to change your class for all passengers to business and add 2 checked bags under your name using your Gold membership. You are willing to pay a fee for the business class changes, upto $600. If the costs are greater than that for the upgrade, then try to upgrade your companion Noah to business under the constraints.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change your class for all passengers to business
dialogue_state.initial_query: upgrade all passengers to business class

hints.hint: This is for the Boston to Minneapolis flight

hints.segment: willing to pay a fee for the business class changes, upto $600
hints.hint: I'm willing to pay up to $600 for the upgrade

hints.segment: if the costs are greater than that for the upgrade, then try to upgrade your companion Noah to business under the constraints
hints.hint: If it costs more, just upgrade my companion Noah under those same terms

hints.segment: add 2 checked bags under your name
hints.hint: Also add 2 checked bags to my name
